title: Machine-readable conformance test vectors (JSON Schema + vectors)

artifacts.description: JSON Schema (draft-07) defining the canonical test vector format: id, category, description, inputs, expected_result (accept|reject), error_code, notes
30+ concrete test vectors covering all required scenarios, each conforming to vector-schema.json
Human-readable guide: purpose, vector categories, how alternative implementations must consume and validate vectors, error code registry
Canonical error code registry mapping symbolic names (ERR_NONCE_REPLAY, ERR_SCOPE_VIOLATION, etc.) to numeric codes and descriptions
Node script that validates vectors.json against vector-schema.json using ajv, exits non-zero on any schema violation — runnable in CI
Conformance runner: feeds each vector's inputs through @bolyra/sdk (witness generation or full proof based on FULL_PROOF env), asserts expected_result and error_code match
Interoperability guidance for alternative SDK authors: how to parse vectors, what 'inputs' fields map to circuit signals, pass/fail criteria, how to report results

steps: Audit existing spec/ files (did-method-bolyra.md, draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md) and circuits/FORMAL-PROPERTIES.md to enumerate all acceptance and rejection conditions that vectors must cover

Define error code registry (error-codes.json): assign symbolic names and numeric codes for every rejection category — ERR_EXPIRED_CREDENTIAL, ERR_REVOKED_IDENTITY, ERR_STALE_ROOT_HUMAN, ERR_STALE_ROOT_AGENT, ERR_SCOPE_SUBSET_VIOLATION, ERR_CUMULATIVE_BIT_VIOLATION, ERR_DELEGATION_MAX_HOPS, ERR_NONCE_REPLAY, ERR_PHANTOM_DELEGATEE, ERR_INVALID_SIGNATURE

Author vector-schema.json (JSON Schema draft-07) with required fields: id (string), category (enum), description (string), inputs (object with sub-schema per circuit), expected_result (enum: accept|reject), error_code (string|null for accept cases), notes (string optional)

Write vectors.json with 30+ entries grouped by category: (1) valid_handshake — 3 vectors covering minimal, full-permissions, and delegation chain happy paths; (2) expired_credential — 2 vectors at boundary and past expiry; (3) revoked_identity — 2 vectors single and batch revocation; (4) stale_root — 4 vectors covering human tree stale, agent tree stale, both stale, root just-rotated; (5) scope_violation — 4 vectors strict subset, exact match, superset attempt, empty scope; (6) cumulative_bit — 4 vectors valid encoding, FINANCIAL_MEDIUM without FINANCIAL_SMALL, SUB_DELEGATE chain, all bits set; (7) delegation_chain — 3 vectors at max hops (accepted), max+1 hops (rejected), zero-hop passthrough; (8) nonce_replay — 3 vectors same nonce same session, same nonce different session, fresh nonce; (9) phantom_delegatee — 3 vectors unregistered delegatee, mismatched commitment, valid delegatee

Write validate-vectors.js using ajv to load vector-schema.json and validate all entries in vectors.json, printing per-vector PASS/FAIL and a summary count — wire into package.json as 'validate:vectors'

Write run-vectors.js conformance runner: for each vector, construct circuit inputs from vector.inputs, call @bolyra/sdk witness generation (or full snarkjs proof if FULL_PROOF=1), map SDK error to error code, assert expected_result and error_code — output JSON results suitable for CI artifact upload
Add 'test:conformance' and 'validate:vectors' scripts to root package.json; add conformance job to CI that runs validate-vectors.js unconditionally and run-vectors.js in fast (witness-only) mode
Write spec/conformance/README.md: purpose, category taxonomy, inputs schema reference per circuit (signal name → vector field mapping), error code table, CI badge instructions

Write spec/conformance/INTEROP.md: step-by-step guide for alternative SDK authors — parsing vectors.json, mapping inputs to their proving system, expected error surfacing contract, how to open a conformance PR with results JSON

Run validate-vectors.js to confirm all 30+ vectors are schema-valid; run run-vectors.js in fast mode against @bolyra/sdk to confirm all accept vectors pass and all reject vectors fail with correct error codes
Commit with DCO sign-off; add spec/conformance/ to landing page ecosystem mentions if relevant
dependencies: snarkjs (witness generation for run-vectors fast mode)
